{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320164104C927E746733FD8D582F3"}"},"total":1501},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7403047726478803774","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者的文笔优美流畅，描写细致入微，让读者仿佛置身于故事的情境之中。无论是对自然景色的描绘，还是对人物心理的刻画，都展现了作者深厚的文学功底
这部小说不仅仅是一个简单的故事，它探讨了许多深刻的主题，如爱与牺牲，正义与邪恶，勇气与恐惧。这些主题引发了读者的思考，让人在享受阅读的同时，也获得了精神上的启迪。
总的来说，这是一部值得一读的佳作。它不仅提供了一个精彩的故事，还通过生动的角色和优美的文笔，带给读者一次难忘的阅读体验。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723659828,"group_id":"7348682178865155134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"脑洞大思维跳跃，豚门+1","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0YNj4f7f+dduhTfLTaT8kROc7LTJjquKy13+WOJeHbf","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/08e8e7dd3d9b422ea03ec5833abf5284~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532329&x-signature=H3oVxydxxCUb8weVhU6h1ZA%2BsPk%3D","user_id":"4199734297497629","user_name":"摆烂滴庄周"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4199734297497629","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1710376271,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7348682178865155134","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：
【生存，神明游戏，群像，直播，合作，成长】
乔清死后进入了一场特殊的生存游戏，游戏开局三选一。
选择一个佣兵帮助自己在游戏中生存下去。
别人开局都是贝爷，鲁滨逊，马特。
乔清开局却是王宝钏，甄嬛，林黛玉。
……
随着游戏的进程才发现，这个世界并不简单。
原来在很久以前，人真的是可以成为神的。
*
阅读指南：
1.成长类，女主前期弱后期强。
2.群像文，没有特定的主角，只是以女主视角展开，有男主为队友，无感情。
3.独立世界观，拒绝不看简介的恶意壁垒。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8a97e2e2ca5ada885d79479fa285a1f3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一颗萝卜","author_id":"","book_id":"7348682178865155134","book_name":"初始属性垃？但我游戏智商无敌啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7350606364118352408","read_count":"10171","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"554354"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"266","tags":"游戏体育,直播,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8f4fbc953bd3f87c227eccbfa382368a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180064&x-signature=UhBWDB4Q90Kon1mqqxg%2B63ILjBI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3759965732084679","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320164104C927E746733FD8D582F3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1182,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":57807,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5783},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7354053537198555966","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看！从作者大大上一本来的，这一本题材格外有趣！女 :"有趣的世界观，从古代修仙引入现代末法时代，基建类的主角游戏升级，实际上是蓝星同星界之间的抗争形式的表现。女主很幽默且聪明，在世界公屏发掘人才，创建团会。善于利用召唤的三个佣兵，正方阵营的诸葛亮，合理利用资源，利用bug无牙仔，冲到星界，守护🌍和平（虽然点击量不够高最后结尾比较仓促结束，但是不算烂尾，填坑不错）值得一看","text_exts":[{"e":96,"s":93,"text":"诸葛亮","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%AF%B8%E8%91%9B%E4%BA%AE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773996064D8D582F3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227457948815535440702%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227348682178865155134%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%AF%B8%E8%91%9B%E4%BA%AE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736443064,"group_id":"7348682178865155134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6HjFZ/kc00dJbsMVcKB254qeXudYyEiAFCKWF6ER0bV","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/94a201270bd741fcb604fb797079c168~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528588&x-signature=oVPkxaAP0mE8kuTQA2aqZ4lTxE8%3D","user_id":"3166192858569307","user_name":"万俟子杰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3166192858569307","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7348682178865155134","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：
